members.label: ceiling light
members.description: flush-mount round ceiling light in hallway
members.long_form_open_description: Small round flush-mounted ceiling fixture with frosted glass and metallic trim centered in the corridor ceiling about halfway down the visible hallway. Provides warm ambient illumination; plaster ceiling around it is textured.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the central ceiling above the hallway path, roughly aligned with the corridor centerline.

members.label: ceiling light
members.long_form_open_description: White frosted dome flush-mount ceiling light centered in the corridor ceiling. Small circular fixture with slightly diffused light; mounted directly to textured ceiling. Provides warm ambient illumination for the narrow hallway.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted on ceiling above the center of the corridor, roughly between the left closet doors and the right-side doorway
members.object_text_long: center sector | White frosted dome flush-mount ceiling light centered in the corridor ceiling. Small circular fixture with slightly diffused light; mounted directly to textured ceiling. Provides warm ambient illumination for the narrow hallway.
